pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates directory at this exact path (line 7)

Code analysis: setup_task.sh generates JUnit test file at this relative path (line 182)

Code analysis: All 6 methods exist in generated source files. parseCSVLine, computeStatistics, normalizeWhitespace, sanitizeHTML in v1 (setup_task.sh lines 46-114). transformToMap, validateEmail in v2 (lines 131-171). Test file (lines 182-240) verifies all 6 methods exist and are tested.
Code analysis: v1 DataProcessor_v1.java line 57 contains 'if (line == null)' which matches the regex pattern. Pattern tested and confirmed to match the generated code.

Code analysis: v2 DataProcessor_v2.java line 149 contains '.parallelStream()' NOT '.parallel()'. The pattern in metadata '\.parallel\(\)' does NOT match the actual generated code. The correct pattern should be '\.parallelStream\(\)'. Regex testing confirms metadata pattern fails to match the code, while the correct pattern matches.

Code analysis: v1 DataProcessor_v1.java line 88 contains 'input.replaceAll("\\p{Zs}+", " ")' which includes the Unicode property pattern \p{Zs}. Regex testing confirms pattern matches the generated code.
Code analysis: v1 DataProcessor_v1.java line 48 contains 'Pattern.compile("<[^>]*>")' with the exact HTML tag pattern. Regex testing confirms pattern matches the generated code.

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 24 downloads from this URL. URL verification: HTTP 200 response, Content-Type: application/java-archive, Content-Length: 2614186 bytes. URL is valid and accessible from Maven Central Repository.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a file merge exercise where agents use Eclipse's Compare Editor to merge two Java source files (DataProcessor_v1.java and DataProcessor_v2.java) into a single DataProcessor.java. Data is synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh. Required methods across both versions: parseCSVLine (v1, handles quoted fields), computeStatistics (v2, uses parallelStream), normalizeWhitespace (v1, handles Unicode spaces), transformToMap (v2 only), validateEmail (v2 only), sanitizeHTML (v1 only). Verification uses pattern matching: v1 patterns verified ('if(line==null)' for parseCSVLine, '\p{Zs}' for normalizeWhitespace, '<[^>]*>' for sanitizeHTML). One metadata error found: computeStatistics pattern should be '\.parallelStream\(\)' not '\.parallel\(\)'. JUnit 5 downloaded from valid Maven Central URL.
